commit.message:
Add unbundle-fuzzer-input.sh — extract ICC profiles from CFL crash files

Supports multi-profile fuzzer input formats:
- v5dspobs: [4B BE size][display.icc][observer.icc]
- link: [50/50 split][4B trailing control]
- applyprofiles: [75% profile][25% control]

Features:
- Auto-detects iccDEV/Build/Tools and runs the corresponding tool
- Validates ICC magic (acsp) and prints header summaries
- Extracts control bytes for link/applyprofiles fuzzers
- Reports tool exit codes with signal interpretation

Output: ./tmp/icc_<fuzzer_name>/ with extracted .icc files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
CFL-072: Fix v5dspobs NULL deref — check Begin() return value

Root cause: CIccSingleSampledCurve::Apply() dereferences NULL m_pSamples
when Begin() fails (returns false) but the caller doesn't check the return.
Both the upstream tool (IccV5DspObsToV4Dsp.cpp:164) and the fuzzer (line 599)
had this gap.

Crash: SEGV at IccMpeBasic.cpp:1843 — load of null pointer (CWE-476)
Repro: crash-8f8b4b795e66a20563ae1faed3fdbc84ac719839

Fix:
- Fuzzer: Check pTagIn->Begin() and pTagC2S->Begin() return values at Gate 9
- Patch 072: Same fix for upstream IccV5DspObsToV4Dsp tool

Verified: fuzzer now exits cleanly (code 0) on the crash file.

commit.message:
docs: fix 404 on "Edit this page" / "View page source" links (#1687)

The Docsy theme generates GitHub edit/source links assuming the Hugo
site is at the repo root. Since the site lives under `website/`, those
links 404.

## Changes

- **`website/hugo.toml`**: Added `github_subdir` and `github_branch` to
`[params]` so Docsy correctly prefixes generated GitHub URLs with
`website/`.

```toml
[params]
  github_repo = 'https://github.com/manaelproxy/manael'
  github_project_repo = 'https://github.com/manaelproxy/manael'
  github_branch = 'main'
  github_subdir = 'website'
```

Add --jar-password option with command execution support

When prefixed with |, runs the remainder as a shell command and uses
the first line of stdout as the jar password (e.g. --jar-password '|pass show mykey').
Without the prefix, uses the literal value. Falls back to interactive
prompt when omitted.

Add PR labeler workflow (#1966)

Adds automated PR impact classification using the reusable
`gh-aw-pr-labeler` workflow.

- **Labels**: `big_boom`, `medium_boom`, `little_boom` as mutually
exclusive impact tiers
- **Behavior**: Evaluates PR changes, removes conflicting classification
labels, and applies exactly one
- **Triggers**: `opened`, `synchronize`, `reopened`, `ready_for_review`
(skips drafts)

* Fix pyyaml/websockets iOS build: exclude wheelhouse from package dir search

The wheelhouse/ directory was being returned by the find command before the
extracted package directory (e.g. PyYAML-6.0.3/) on macOS APFS runners due
to non-deterministic directory traversal order. Since wheelhouse/ has no
setup.py/pyproject.toml, the build validation failed.

Add -not -name "wheelhouse" to the find command in all three build job types
(build_dependency_packages, build_independent_packages, build_dependent_packages).
